title: NEO 4.0 P4-AUTONOMY C5 plan-audit gate artifact (unavailability disclosure | directional disposition; one JSONL line)
_home: <RunRoot>/clarity_gate_ledger.jsonl - append-only; every record binds to the EXACT plan_round + plan bundle_diff_hash; record_sha256 tamper-EVIDENT (NB-4).
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P4-C5 (schema gate cleared 2026-07-07, Raphael-recorded). Plan-audit R1-3 encoded fail-closed BOTH WAYS over the supported keyword set ('not' unsupported; ABSENT-property = empty-enum, the external_slice_call_entry precedent): (a) an unavailability_disclosure REQUIRES stage+reason and REFUSES every disposition field; (b) a directional_disposition REQUIRES recorded_by+authority_basis+disagreement_text+rationale and REFUSES the adapter-stage fields; (c) either kind omitting one of its own kind-required fields is invalid. R1-1: stage is a STRUCTURED mechanical identifier (uppercase token pattern) - blank/vague prose stages are schema-invalid; the module takes stage/reason VERBATIM from the frozen adapter return, or ADAPTER_THREW for a thrown failure. R1-2: authority_basis is the FIXED ratified-policy citation (const - never free prose); the record is DISCLOSURE not approval, the human START gate stays the sole plan authority.

authority_basis.const: ADDENDUM 2026-07-07 PRE-START PLAN AUDIT (Raphael-recorded): directional-only conservatism disagreements are disclosed at the gate and never auto-block; the human START gate is the sole plan authority.
